headline: Keurig Dr Pepper to Participate in Deutsche Bank dbAccess Global Consumer Conference
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) today announced that Tim Cofer, Chief Executive Officer, and Anthony DiSilvestro, Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Deutsche Bank dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on June 3, 2026 at 5:15 AM ET.

raw.headline: Keurig Dr Pepper to Participate in Deutsche Bank dbAccess Global Consumer Conference
raw.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) today announced that Tim Cofer, Chief Executive Officer, and Anthony DiSilvestro, Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Deutsche Bank dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on June 3, 2026 at 5:15 AM ET.

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share, payable in U.S. dollars, on the Company's common stock. The regular quarterly dividend will be paid on July 10, 2026 to shareholders of record on June 26, 2026.
